update_rules: Store a strong secondary pattern if clearly present
Save emotional state if clearly expressed
Track commitments made by the user
Update recurring blocks if repeated across sessions
Record progress signals if the user reports success
Record obstacles if the user names what got in the way
Store what helped if support mode reduced distress
Do not save trivial small talk or generic greetings
Keep memory concise, useful, and action-relevant

fields_to_update.main_issue: Short summary of what the user is dealing with
fields_to_update.primary_pattern: Main coaching pattern detected from the user's message
fields_to_update.secondary_pattern: Optional second pattern if clearly present
fields_to_update.emotional_state: Simple label such as stressed, anxious, hurt, stuck, confused, hopeful
fields_to_update.action_step: The next step the user committed to
fields_to_update.commitments: Specific promises, timelines, or actions the user agreed to
fields_to_update.recurring_blocks: Repeated obstacles, thinking loops, or stuck patterns
fields_to_update.progress: Wins, improvements, completions, or positive movement mentioned by the user
fields_to_update.obstacle: What got in the way of progress
fields_to_update.what_helped: What reduced overwhelm or helped the user move forward

save_conditions: Save memory after each meaningful coaching exchange
Do not overwrite useful existing memory unless the new information is clearer or more current
If the user changes goals or direction, update current focus
If a pattern appears in multiple sessions, promote it into recurring_blocks
If the user completes an action, add it to progress
